content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew_reject
C: gt(abs_delta,300) ∧ edge_clock_drift ∧ valid_webhook_lost
P: provider_skew_allowed ∧ "401" ∧ suppressed ∧ "300" ∧ threshold_soft
V: skew_tolerance_added ∧ edge_ntp_lag_accounted ∧ no_replay_widened
A: extend_window_60s ∧ reg_test_boundary_cases ∧ min_fix_threshold_360

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew_reject.
Constraints: gt(abs_delta, 300) and edge_clock_drift and valid_webhook_lost.
Plan: provider_skew_allowed and "401" and suppressed and "300" and threshold_soft.
Verify: skew_tolerance_added and edge_ntp_lag_accounted and no_replay_widened.
Answer target: extend_window_60s and reg_test_boundary_cases and min_fix_threshold_360.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: billing_overdue
C: overdue_detected ∧ grace_window="24h" ∧ charge_loop_guard
P: emit="402" ∧ grace_expires="24h" ∧ block_retry

[AUDIT]
Goal: billing_overdue.
Constraints: overdue_detected and grace_window="24h" and charge_loop_guard.
Plan: emit="402" and grace_expires="24h" and block_retry.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: nine_person_team
C: "PostgreSQL"∧steady_traffic∧compliance_ready
V: "9"∧small_team_ops∧low_complexity

[AUDIT]
Goal: nine_person_team.
Constraints: "PostgreSQL" and steady_traffic and compliance_ready.
Verify: "9" and small_team_ops and low_complexity.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: launch_capsule
P: async_enrichment ∧ worker_sidecar ∧ pt_mlops
V: scale_bottleneck ∧ schema_drift ∧ sidecar_overhead
A: default_arch=fastapi_worker_pg ∧ short_why=lean_team_fits_sync_boundaries

[AUDIT]
Goal: launch_capsule.
Plan: async_enrichment and worker_sidecar and pt_mlops.
Verify: scale_bottleneck and schema_drift and sidecar_overhead.
Answer target: default_arch=fastapi_worker_pg and short_why=lean_team_fits_sync_boundaries.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: file_download_handler
C: user_input∧path_traversal∧".."∧unvalidated
P: sanitize_input∧block_traversal∧".."∧restrict_baseDir
V: check_extension∧verify_resolved_path∧confirm_within_baseDir
A: validate_before∧"download"∧reject_malicious∧return_403

[AUDIT]
Goal: file_download_handler.
Constraints: user_input and path_traversal and ".." and unvalidated.
Plan: sanitize_input and block_traversal and ".." and restrict_baseDir.
Verify: check_extension and verify_resolved_path and confirm_within_baseDir.
Answer target: validate_before and "download" and reject_malicious and return_403.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: sql_injection_risk
P: allowlist_sort_fields ∧ reject_unknown_values ∧ parameterize_query
V: input_validated ∧ allowlist_enforced ∧ safe_query_built
A: block_merge ∧ require_sort_allowlist ∧ retest_invoice_admin_api

[AUDIT]
Goal: sql_injection_risk.
Plan: allowlist_sort_fields and reject_unknown_values and parameterize_query.
Verify: input_validated and allowlist_enforced and safe_query_built.
Answer target: block_merge and require_sort_allowlist and retest_invoice_admin_api.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: reconcile_batch
C: load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics
P: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ minimal_change
V: db_err_guard ∧ "next(err)" ∧ order_preserved
A: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ minimal_change

[AUDIT]
Goal: reconcile_batch.
Constraints: load_batch and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and db.save and emit_metrics.
Plan: "async" and "await" and minimal_change.
Verify: db_err_guard and "next(err)" and order_preserved.
Answer target: "async" and "await" and "next(err)" and minimal_change.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: loadGatewayUser
C: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log
P: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ minimal_change
V: db_err ∧ "next(err)" ∧ order_preserved
A: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ "next(err)" ∧ deliver

[AUDIT]
Goal: loadGatewayUser.
Constraints: session_check and db.findUser and flags.load and audit.log.
Plan: "async" and "await" and minimal_change.
Verify: db_err and "next(err)" and order_preserved.
Answer target: "async" and "await" and "next(err)" and deliver.
